secoes.conteudo: Computer Science student at UNIFEI (6th semester), with experience in backend development, REST APIs, and system integration. I have worked with Python in production and developed fullstack applications deployed on AWS. I have an ease for learning new technologies quickly and autonomously, and I seek to contribute to international teams with proactivity and continuous evolution.

grupos.label: AI in Development
itens: OpenCode with instructed and careful use to support development

itens.descricao: SIMCafé — Development of a complete internal system: structured backend architecture, REST API, PostgreSQL, AWS. React + Vite frontend; Node.js + Express + Prisma backend.

Golden Rastreamento — Development of system integrations via REST APIs in Python, including integration with chatbots and internal financial systems. Data analysis and processing for internal process automation.

itens: Continuous learning and quick adaptation to new technologies and contexts
Proactivity and autonomy in developing solutions and optimizing processes
Systemic and analytical vision for problem-solving
Clear communication and ease of collaborating with multidisciplinary teams
Emotional stability combined with seriousness in fulfilling responsibilities
Determination to add more value than expected
